entities.name: Approve (A)
entities.context: Lesson review action that adds lesson as example to principles and archives to N5/lessons/archive/

entities.name: Edit (E)
entities.context: Lesson review action for modifying fields before approving with interactive prompts

entities.name: Reject (R)
entities.context: Lesson review action that permanently discards lessons with confirmation and logging

entities.name: Skip (S)
entities.context: Lesson review action that leaves lesson in pending for later review

entities.name: Quit (Q)
entities.context: Lesson review action that saves progress and exits while preserving pending lessons

entities.name: Principle Update Logic
entities.context: Process for updating principles when lessons are approved - finds matches, loads modules, appends examples

entities.name: State Verification (Principle 18)
entities.context: A principle stating that state verification is mandatory

entities.name: Lesson Archive
entities.context: Storage location at N5/lessons/archive/ for approved lessons

entities.name: Principle Modules
entities.context: Markdown files like principles/quality.md that contain principle definitions and change logs

entities.name: principle_refs
entities.context: Reference system used to match lessons to their corresponding principles

relationships.context: Approving a lesson triggers the principle update logic
Loads and updates principle module files when processing approved lessons
Uses principle_refs to find matching principles for lessons
State Verification is an example principle that can receive lesson examples
